---
title: "Page 2 - Video Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec02-sp02"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec02"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Video

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Embed the video link or iframe here._]

---

## What to look for

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-3 specific points for the learner to focus on while watching._]

---

## Key ideas

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Summarize the main concepts presented in the video._]

---

## Follow-up

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Suggest a next step or related resource after viewing._]

---



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction or instructions for viewing this video._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.video}
<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Embed the video link or iframe here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

---

## Guided Video Analysis

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-3 specific points for the learner to focus on while watching._]

- Observation 1
- Observation 2

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Reflection and follow-up**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief reflection question or next-step instruction after viewing._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add any concluding remarks or transitions here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this open reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="open"}
**Personal Reflection**

<!-- editable:start prompt -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this true false._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.quiz data-variant="true_false"}
**Knowledge Quiz**

<!-- editable:start questions -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add questions matching the true_false format here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief summary or reflection prompt after completing the assessment._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 1 - Data Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Text Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
